Bin Collection Schedule

Address: 1 Fleet Road, Aldershot, GU14 7JF

Upcoming Collections

Green Bin - Rubbish

Next collection: Friday 28 March 2026

Frequency: Fortnightly on Fridays

What goes in: General household waste

Blue Bin - Recycling

Next collection: Friday 4 April 2026

Frequency: Fortnightly on Fridays (alternate weeks to rubbish)

What goes in: Paper, cardboard, plastic bottles, tins, cans

Glass Box / Purple Bin

Next collection: Friday 4 April 2026

Frequency: Fortnightly on Fridays (same week as recycling)

What goes in: Glass bottles and jars only

Food Waste Caddy

Next collection: Friday 28 March 2026

Frequency: Weekly on Fridays

What goes in: All food waste including meat, dairy, and cooked food

Garden Waste (Brown Bin) - Subscription Service

Status: Subscribed (Valid until 31 March 2027)

Next collection: Friday 4 April 2026

Frequency: Fortnightly March to November on Fridays

What goes in: Grass cuttings, hedge trimmings, small branches

Download calendar (iCal format)

Important Notes

  • Please present bins by 7am on collection day
  • Collections may be delayed on bank holidays - check website for updates
  • Contaminated bins may not be collected
